evidence: Held-out static Grill persistence release boundary.
must: keep ordinary question-first requests conversation-only; independently major Grill and explicit save use only the managed inspect -> schema -> apply transaction in an initialized writable project, with new records written as schema v2 frontier/current_batch state, one atomic answered-batch update, and v1 archives still readable under transaction-owned authority
must_not: write when no files is present, directly write discussion Markdown or an index, implement, or infer implementation authority
prompt: Contrast 'ask me first' with '$grill-me and save', including the user's 'no files' override.
